policy: D1/D7 retention, mastery velocity, exam uplift and question quality index use only local learner evidence and repository QA reports.

checks.label: Core metrics dashboard exists
checks.detail: Outcome loop must compute D1/D7, mastery velocity, exam score uplift and question quality index.

checks.label: Missing evidence remains unknown/unavailable
checks.detail: Metrics dashboard must not backfill or fabricate missing learner evidence.

checks.label: Learning Evidence renders dashboard cards
checks.detail: The portal must expose the dashboard inside Learning Evidence.

checks.label: Dashboard styles are present
checks.detail: Metrics cards need a distinct, compact layout.

checks.label: Question quality index comes from real QA report
checks.detail: Question QA report index: 100% across 506 questions.

checks.label: Metrics dashboard gate is wired
checks.detail: package.json must expose summary/write/strict metrics dashboard commands.
